case_title: EVERGROW INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. VARTAN'S REFRIGERATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY VARTAN---OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
